summary: Iteration 31: Complete validation of Brand Valuation (4-step wizard) and Brand Architecture modules. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified - Valuation wizard with financial data, RBI (5 questions), BS (10 Interbrand factors), and results display. Architecture page with arch type selection, global presence, and product portfolio management.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/valuation/sectors returns 8 sectors with multiples
Backend: Sectors have required fields (key, label, mult with b/min/max)
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/valuations creates valuation with computed results
Backend: Valuation response includes multiplo_final, ev_min/mid/max, rbi_score, bs_score, brand_min/mid/max, brand_share_pct
Backend: RBI score calculation correct (average of 5 questions)
Backend: BS score calculation correct (average of 10 factors)
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/valuations lists valuations
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/valuations/{id} returns single valuation
Backend: DELETE /api/brands/{brand_id}/valuations/{id} deletes valuation
Backend: Valuation endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/architecture returns architecture data
Backend: PUT /api/brands/{brand_id}/architecture updates arch_type (mono/endo/ind)
Backend: PUT /api/brands/{brand_id}/architecture updates hq_country and global_ops
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/architecture/products adds a product
Backend: DELETE /api/brands/{brand_id}/architecture/products/{id} removes product
Backend: Architecture endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Low margin (<8%) reduces valuation multiple
Backend: High margin (>=28%) increases valuation multiple
Backend: Brand value calculated based on RBI and BS scores
Frontend: /valuation page loads with data-testid brand-valuation-page
Frontend: Step navigation (Financeiro, Brand Contribution, Brand Strength, Resultado) visible
Frontend: Step 0 - Marca field (data-testid val-marca) present
Frontend: Step 0 - Setor dropdown (data-testid val-setor) present
Frontend: Step 0 - Receita field (data-testid val-receita) present
Frontend: Step 0 - EBITDA field (data-testid val-ebitda) present
Frontend: Step 0 - Divida field (data-testid val-divida) present
Frontend: Step 0 - Next button (data-testid val-next-0) works
Frontend: Step 1 - RBI 5 questions with score levels (Baixo to Alto) present
Frontend: Step 1 - RBI score buttons (data-testid val-rbi_q{1-5}-{value}) clickable
Frontend: Step 1 - Next button (data-testid val-next-1) works
Frontend: Step 2 - BS 10 Interbrand factors with score levels present
Frontend: Step 2 - BS score buttons (data-testid val-bs_{factor}-{value}) clickable
Frontend: Step 2 - Calculate button (data-testid val-calculate-btn) works
Frontend: Step 3 - Valuation results displayed (Enterprise Value, Brand Value)
Frontend: Step 3 - Export JSON button (data-testid val-export-btn) present
Frontend: /brand-architecture page loads with data-testid brand-architecture-page
Frontend: Architecture type selection (Monolitica, Endossada, Independente) works
Frontend: Architecture type buttons (data-testid arch-type-mono/endo/ind) clickable
Frontend: HQ Country dropdown (data-testid arch-hq) present
Frontend: Global Operations toggle (data-testid arch-global-ops) works
Frontend: Add Product button (data-testid add-product-btn) works
Frontend: New Product Name field (data-testid new-product-name) present
Frontend: Save Product button (data-testid save-product-btn) works
Frontend: Product list shows added products with delete option
Frontend: Sidebar shows Arquitetura and Valuation links
critical_code_review_comments: valuation.py: Well-implemented compute_valuation() with margin, growth, recurrence, and debt adjustments
valuation.py: RBI (5 questions) and BS (10 Interbrand factors) scoring correctly averaged
valuation.py: Brand value calculation uses RBI percentage and BS multiplier correctly
valuation.py: Sectors endpoint returns 8 sectors with base multiples (min/b/max)
brand_architecture.py: CRUD operations for architecture type and products working
brand_architecture.py: Upsert pattern used for architecture updates (creates if not exists)
BrandValuation.js: 4-step wizard with proper state management and navigation
BrandValuation.js: Score levels (Baixo to Alto) with visual feedback on selection
BrandValuation.js: Results display with formatted currency values and progress bars
BrandArchitecture.js: Architecture type selection with visual highlighting
BrandArchitecture.js: Product portfolio management with add/remove functionality
App.js: Routes correctly configured for /valuation and /brand-architecture
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Produto_Frontend for architecture testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 validated Brand Valuation and Brand Architecture modules. Key findings: 1) Valuation backend APIs work correctly - sectors endpoint returns 8 sectors, CRUD operations for valuations work with computed results (multiplo_final, ev_min/mid/max, rbi_score, bs_score, brand_min/mid/max). 2) Architecture backend APIs work correctly - GET/PUT for architecture, POST/DELETE for products. 3) Frontend Valuation wizard has 4 steps: Financeiro (financial data), Brand Contribution (5 RBI questions), Brand Strength (10 BS factors), Resultado (computed values). 4) Frontend Architecture page has arch type selection (mono/endo/ind), global presence (hq_country, global_ops), and product portfolio management. 5) Sidebar shows Arquitetura and Valuation links. NO MOCKED APIs - all endpoints are real.
notes: The valuation computation uses a hybrid methodology: financial multiples adjusted for margin, growth, recurrence, and debt, combined with Brand Contribution (RBI) and Brand Strength (BS) scores. The brand value is calculated as EV * RBI% * BS_multiplier. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing.
